name: sundsvall-fullstack
description: Sundsvall fullstack development plugin — dept44 Spring Boot backend, Next.js + @sk-web-gui frontend, Jira/Confluence integration, and coding guidelines. Note: Jira/Confluence MCP requires JIRA_PERSONAL_TOKEN and CONFLUENCE_PERSONAL_TOKEN in your shell profile (~/.zshrc). Without them you will see an MCP error on load — all other features work fine. See README for one-time setup.
